message:
feat(spork): add atomic spawn_named_gen_server API

Extends Scope with spawn_named_gen_server(), combining task spawn and
name registration into a single atomic operation.

Phase 1: Spawn the GenServer (creates task record + handle)
Phase 2: Register name under the task's ID
Atomicity: If registration fails, task is dropped before scheduling

Returns NamedGenServerHandle<S> holding:
- GenServerHandle<S>: server reference for call/cast
- NameLease: obligation (drop bomb) requiring explicit resolution

Error handling via NamedSpawnError:
- Spawn(SpawnError): underlying task spawn failed
- NameTaken(NameLeaseError): name already registered by another task

This prevents the "server spawned but name taken" race condition and
makes name lease an obligation that forces cleanup or handoff, enabling
OTP-style named processes with structural correctness guarantees.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
